programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Selfie With Bajrangi
programme.desc: Ankush's life changes when he meets a mysterious nine-year-old child named Bajrangi, who is visible to nobody but him alone.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: A fox tries to save her cornfield from the crows but is unable to do so.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey, Bunny and the gang are excited after they receive an invitation to a Halloween party. However, confusion ensues after the party receives a strange visitor.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey Bunny and Popat persuade Zordaar to visit the vibrant carnival for amusement. Since they lack sufficient currency for purchases, the trio chooses to participate in a contest to obtain funds.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Kitty encounters a problem when her water hose suddenly stops working. As a result, she seeks help in order to repair it.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae plans on preparing a meal for Hiroshi's client but she forgets a few ingredients. As a result, she instructs Shin-chan to fetch them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After purchasing dog food for Shiro, Misae instructs Shin-chan to feed Shiro on time. However, Shin-chan forgets to do so.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae falls ill, Shin-chan tries to care for her and fills an ice bag with water. However, he leaves the tap running and causes the house to flood.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan begins a decent march at the Sports Day event but eventually he forgets his steps. Consequently, he ends up confounding the other students as well.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan visits the department store with his mother. However, once there, he wanders around and realises that he is lost.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan is left at home by Misae to take care of Shiro and the household whilst she steps out to shop for groceries. However, on returning she finds the house in a mess.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: As the winter season reaches its conclusion, the students at the kindergarten and Yoshinaga celebrate by throwing beans out in the air.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Despite her initial apprehensions, Misae gifts a tricycle to Shin-chan. However, his tricycle falls into a dirty lake by accident.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Hiroshi and Misae decide to spend some time playing badminton with Shin-chan, they disagree mid-game and begin to quarrel.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Masao cannot find his crayon, he gets Shin-chan to help him look for it. However, after their investigations, Shin-chan remembers where the crayon is.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Yoshinaga falls sick whilst Shin-chan awaits his mother to receive him. As a result, Shin-Chan asks Matsuzaka for assistance.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and Masao are requested by Takeshi to take him to Masao's house. However, Shin-chan takes him to his house instead.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: In order to get some fuel, Hiroshi and Shin-chan visit a petrol pump where they meet Shinobu since she is employed there.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Yoshinaga ends up losing her sandal, Shin-chan tries to play detective with his friends and discovers that it was stolen by a dog.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin chan in the dreaming world
programme.desc: Shin-chan's dreams start to become nightmares in which his family and friends get stuck. Now it is up to him and the Kasukabe Defense Group to escape the nightmare and save the dream.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Misae steps outside, Keiko meets with Shin-chan and ends up spending time with him whilst they wait for Misae to return.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin chan and The Buri Buri 3 Minutes Charge
programme.desc: Shin-chan's dreams become reality when his family is recruited by a time traveller to fight monsters. With just three minutes to complete their mission, they race against time to battle the entities.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: One day Shin-chan carries a chick to his kindergarten and leaves it in the poultry farm. Consequently, some of the birds get out of the farm.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae takes Shin-chan to a restaurant to eat noodles. However, when Shin-chan tries to pour noodles into his bowl, he drops them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae has to step outside, Fumie helps with looking after Shin-chan. Whilst spending time together, Fumie teaches him mathematics.

programme.title: Crayon Shin-chan Spin-off: Lone Wolf and Family
programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.

programme.title: Crayon Shin-chan Spin-off: Lone Wolf and Family
programme.desc: Master butt-swordsman Lone Wolf and his family travel with a mysterious girl and a wild dog. Their lives are soon threatened by the armpit-swordsmen of the Demon Bull Clan.

programme.title: Crayon Shin-chan Spin-off: Lone Wolf and Family
programme.desc: Master butt-swordsman Lone Wolf and his family travel with a mysterious girl and a wild dog. Their lives are soon threatened by the armpit-swordsmen of the Demon Bull Clan.

programme.title: Crayon Shin-chan Spin-off: Lone Wolf and Family
programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.

programme.title: Crayon Shin-chan Spin-off: Lone Wolf and Family
programme.desc: A fresh Shin Chan series explores bold, imaginative stories beyond the family's daily life, with space thrillers, dark fantasy creatures, and playful humor for fans and newcomers alike.

programme.title: Sinchan-Bakumori! Kung Fu Boys
programme.desc: Noticing the change in Masao's behaviour, Shin-chan and his friends learn kung fu. Later, Shin-chan, his friends and the Kasukabe defence group try to restore peace in the city.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan, a mischievous five-year-old, constantly disrupts the lives of those around him with his childish antics, generating humorous chaos and exasperation.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Dooba Dooba notices a Christmas tree growing from the ground and hears a peculiar sound. Sadly for him, he is stranded on the tree.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: The kids compete to win the Christmas tree decoration prize. Later, Santa visits Pari Lok to announce the winners.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Santa begins to have hallucinations after Bhayankar Pari puts her charms on him.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: The excited kids are having fun at the Christmas party. Meanwhile, Montu wants to use his shock chocolate to bother all the kids and spoil the party.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Bhayankar Pari plans to ruin Christmas by mixing 'Nindyu Ras' in Santa's drink. Later, she uses Manav to execute her evil plan.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Montu dressed as Santa Claus manipulates the children for gifts. Later, Maanav and Santa become victims to Bhayankar Pari's plot after Santa consumes the sleeping potion.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal scolds Jethalal for missing a critical payment. Meanwhile, Sodhi reveals something exciting to the other residents.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi gets ready for his marriage anniversary. Later, the men of Gokuldham Society help Sodhi look for the perfect present for his wife.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham Society wonder why Sodhi did not invite them to the party. Soon, chaos ensues as Sodhi begins his celebrations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Sodhi parties with his friends, all Gokuldham men help Sodhi cleanse his house as Abdul calls to tell them that Roshan arrives the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All Gokuldham men are nervous after learning that Roshan is in front of the door and is ready to enter Sodhi's house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Wanting to save Sodhi, all Gokuldham men come up with a fancy plan. Bhide meets Roshan and tells her that Sodhi is heading to Udvada.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi's friends arrive at Roshan's house to celebrate. However, Roshan is shocked to find the guest carrying a bottle of wine.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham Society are anxious about the revelation of Sodhi's truth. In the meantime, Roshan visits Bhide's home to inquire about Sodhi.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide tries to cover up for Sodhi. Later, Roshan is in for a huge shock when she visits Popatlal's house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Roshan travels back and forth between various houses to look for Sodhi. However, her search proves unsuccessful.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer reveals that Jethalal instructed Bhide and the others to lie to Roshan. Later, Champaklal searches for Jethalal in his room but discovers that he is not present.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Despite her best efforts, Roshan is still unable to find Sodhi. Soon, she decides to make a drastic decision.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: An annoyed Jethalal confronts Bhide and the others for disclosing the truth. However, Bhide and Iyer hold Jethalal responsible for the situation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi and Roshan distribute sweets among the other residents and invite them to the anniversary party.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone enjoys the celebrations at Sodhi and Roshan's party. Meanwhile, Champaklal plans to take a trip with his friends.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A woman suffering from memory loss gets abducted by a group of gangsters. She somehow manages to escape but meets with an accident.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Daya gets severely wounded when a group of thugs chase him in Kolkata. Meanwhile, in Mumbai, several clues make the police believe that Daya has killed someone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali Mehta finds herself perturbed when Dr Hathi pays a visit and complains to Taarak Mehta about her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal gets a pleasant surprise when Babita pays him a visit at Gada Electronics to repair her mobile phone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal gets mad at Daya after her new shampoo ruins his hair. Meanwhile, Daya tries to find a solution to the problem.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak Mehta decides to have some fun and tells Jethalal that his only option to get out of the problem is to go bald.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi arrives at Jethalal's house and misunderstands that Jethalal has a heart attack. Daya shares her trick with everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While it is heavily raining, Jethalal is on the way home and encounters a mysterious lady dressed in a white saree.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Lord Vishnu listens to the prayers of the other gods and decides to take birth on planet Earth as Lord Krishna in order to put an end to all evil.

programme.title: Super Dancer -- Chapter 5
programme.desc: The contestants compete against each other and conduct performances rife with grandeur and royalty to impress the judges and leave the audience entertained.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena and the parents run into producer Asit Kumar Modi at Disneyland. The members try to make Jethalal go on a dangerous ride.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Members of Gokuldham look for Bhide, the leader of the group, in Disneyland. Asit insists that the members should see the parade.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While in Disneyland, all the members are excited and happy. The kids call Popatlal and reveal their wish to him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya and Taarak miss Jethalal while he is away. Later, a mysterious lady arrives in Gokuldham looking for Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya bumps into Gulabo, a 'Kashmiri' woman who claims that she is trying to find her husband. Later, she invites Gulabo to her home.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya is in a state of shock and Gulabo consoles her by saying that this is nobody's fault. Daya hesitates to break the news to her father-in-law and introduces Gulabo as her friend.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Panic occurs in Gokuldham and brings everyone into a state of shock when Daya informs them that Gulabo claims to be Jethalal's first wife.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal praises Daya for her maturity and calmness. Later, Natu Kaka and Bagha are deeply shocked by the news.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Jethalal comes back, he finds everyone in a strange mood. Later, he is shocked when Daya tells him that Gulabo is his first wife.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal reveals to everyone the shocking truth about his Kashmir trip many years ago as he narrates an incident where he gets the chance to act in a marriage scene with Gulabo for a documentary.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali gives Taarak the idea to write an article on the water problem in the country. While playing, the kids waste a lot of water, and Bhide gets angry with them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide informs the ladies about the possible water shortage in the city. Jethalal is forced to use cold water from the refrigerator to take a bath.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Daya are in for a surprise when Sundar arrives with a bunch of people all the way from Ahmedabad.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: One of Daya's guests creates a scene and becomes hostile. He attacks Bhide and other members in Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Following a visit from guests, the Gada family struggles to maintain cleanliness. Jethalal discovers gutkha packets in his room.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone tries to fill their buckets from the tanker. While Jethalal gets his foot stuck in a pot, Champaklal accidentally gets drenched to the bones.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal's attempts to impress Babita with her water bucket are thwarted due to Popatlal. Everyone go through various troubles due to water shortage.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is upset when a childhood photograph of him enjoying mangoes makes the rounds. Bhide visits Gada Electronics to buy a cheap mobile phone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The women of Gokuldham society ask Bhide to order mangoes from Ratnagiri. Bhide's new phone has a problem.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal replaces Bhide's phone. Bhide's relative suggests that he should deal in mangoes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide is extremely pleased with his idea to deal in mangoes. He orders a great amount of mangoes from Ratnagiri.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide puts up a mango stall in the compound and decides to deliver the fruits to all the residents of Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The women of Gokuldham Society notice that all the mangoes are rotten and decide to complain to Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal learns about the rotten mangoes and becomes furious. Bhide struggles to cope with all the complaints from his customers.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal insults Bhide and Bhau Kaka for selling terrible mangoes. Bhau Kaka arrives with a group of men, demanding to see Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal suspects that Bhau Kaka has arrived to beat him up and grows terrified, but things take a surprising twist when Bhau Kaka reveals his true intentions.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Tapu Sena's vacations commence, the children decide to go on a picnic together. They begin their mission to convince their parents to take them to an amusement park.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Tapu Sena's parents refuse to take them on a picnic, the children go on a unique strike. Anjali provides a solution that makes all the members of Gokuldham Society happy.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The demon Simhamukhasur beseeches the goddess Mata Kali, seeking her blessing to vanquish Lord Kartikeya. The demon's request hangs in the balance as he awaits the goddess's decision.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Pallavi gets admitted to the hospital as she gets exhausted due to stress and working for the family all day. Maddam Sir comes up with an elaborate plan to teach her a valuable lesson.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma apologises to Maddam Sir and rejoins her duty. However, she is more determined than ever to win the Best Police Station competition.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak rushes to Gada Electronics and finds Jethalal in an unusually calm demeanour. Jethalal reveals that Bagha didn't steal any goods from his shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi requests his wife to sit next to him because he wants to tell her a secret. But then, Sodhi says he will tell her about it later.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Pallavi gets admitted to the hospital as she gets exhausted due to stress and working for the family all day. Maddam Sir comes up with an elaborate plan to teach her a valuable lesson.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma apologises to Maddam Sir and rejoins her duty. However, she is more determined than ever to win the Best Police Station competition.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak rushes to Gada Electronics and finds Jethalal in an unusually calm demeanour. Jethalal reveals that Bagha didn't steal any goods from his shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi requests his wife to sit next to him because he wants to tell her a secret. But then, Sodhi says he will tell her about it later.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Roshan is worried about the secret Sodhi will reveal and thus, she announces a meeting with the ladies of Gokuldham society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When the fortune teller does not have any concrete answers, Anjali makes Roshan fake sickness to coerce Sodhi into revealing his secret.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol Satark
programme.desc: A compilation of some of the most spine-chilling cases from 'Crime Patrol', which investigates murders, kidnappings and thefts among other heinous crimes.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show - Masti Lagataar
programme.desc: Host and comedian Kapil Sharma invites popular celebrity guests from various entertainment industries to discuss their work while entertaining them and the audience with humorous skits and banter.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from the Kapil Sharma Show features the renowned comedian Kapil Sharma entertaining the audience with hilarious skits and interactions.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from 'The Kapil Sharma Show' celebrates top highlights, playful roasts and the vibrant energy that defines its comedy.

programme.title: Indian Idol
programme.desc: Various talented participants from India compete against each other during a singing competition in order to impress the judges and win the title.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Crime Patrol: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The host presents dramatised re-enactments of crime cases and the vigilant attempts of the police department to solve the cases within 48 hours.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Kulkarni sends his goons on a mission to tarnish Dr Pillai's reputation. On the other hand, Sai encourages Jhipri to work with Rehana.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Kulkarni asks his men to get every detail about Dr Pillai's past. On the other hand, Sai is elated when Jhipri succeeds in her first mission.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: When Sai tries to offer help to Dr Pillai, the latter refuses to hear him out. Later, Kulkarni manages to find out Dr Pillai's past.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: The villagers bring a patient who is on his deathbed to Sai and ask him to treat the man. Sai then decides to treat the man with the help of his pet crow.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.
